ast.name: log
ast.target: 清理未使用图片插件已加载...

ast.name: log
ast.target: 清理未使用图片插件已卸载...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want Ribbon Icon for clearing the images.
ast.target: 开启此项，可为清理图片功能添加一个 Ribbon 图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn off if you dont want to view the delete logs Modal to pop up after deletion is completed. It wont appear if no image is deleted
ast.target: 关闭此项，清理完成后将不再弹出显示删除日志的模态窗口。如果未删除任何图片，该窗口也不会出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select where you want images to be moved once they are deleted
ast.target: 选择删除后图片的移动位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Provide the FULL path of the folder names (Case Sensitive) divided by comma (,) to be excluded from clearing. 
					i.e. For images under Personal/Files/Zodiac -> Personal/Files/Zodiac should be used for exclusion
ast.target:
提供要排除清理的文件夹完整路径（区分大小写），多个路径用逗号（,）分隔。
					例如：要排除 Personal/Files/Zodiac 下的图片，应填写 Personal/Files/Zodiac

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on this option if you want to also exclude all subfolders of the folder paths provided above.
ast.target: 开启此项，将同时排除上述文件夹路径下的所有子文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 已删除图片的目标位置

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 排除文件夹的完整路径

ast.name: text
ast.target: 清理未使用图片 - 日志

regex.source: setDesc("Turn on if you want Ribbon Icon for clearing the images.")
regex.target: setDesc("Turn on if you want Ribbon Icon for clearing the images.")

regex.source: setDesc("Turn off if you dont want to view the delete logs Modal to pop up after deletion is completed. It wont appear if no image is deleted")
regex.target: setDesc("Turn off if you dont want to view the delete logs Modal to pop up after deletion is completed. It wont appear if no image is deleted")

regex.source: setDesc("Select where you want images to be moved once they are deleted")
regex.target: setDesc("Select where you want images to be moved once they are deleted")

regex.source: setDesc("Provide the FULL path of the folder names (Case Sensitive) divided by comma (,) to be excluded from clearing. \n\t\t\t\t\ti.e. For images under Personal/Files/Zodiac -> Personal/Files/Zodiac should be used for exclusion")
regex.target: setDesc("Provide the FULL path of the folder names (Case Sensitive) divided by comma (,) to be excluded from clearing. \n\t\t\t\t\ti.e. For images under Personal/Files/Zodiac -> Personal/Files/Zodiac should be used for exclusion")

regex.source: setDesc("Turn on this option if you want to also exclude all subfolders of the folder paths provided above.")
regex.target: setDesc("Turn on this option if you want to also exclude all subfolders of the folder paths provided above.")

regex.source: log("File not referenced but excluded: "+n.path):(".trash"===e?(yield o.vault.trash(n,!1),i+="[+] Moved to Obsidian Trash: "+n.path+"</br>")
regex.target: log("File not referenced but excluded: "+n.path):(".trash"===e?(yield o.vault.trash(n,!1),i+="[+] Moved to Obsidian Trash: "+n.path+"</br>")

regex.source: Notice(`All ${"image"===i?"images":"attachments"} are used. Nothing was deleted.`)
regex.target: Notice(`All ${"image"===i?"images":"attachments"} are used. Nothing was deleted.`)
